title: Extracting Zip Codes from Addresses
scenario: Write a prompt to extract zip codes from a given string representing an address. The string will contain the address, city, state, and zip code, separated by commas. The output should be the extracted zip code.

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the code adheres to Python 3 syntax and is correctly formatted.
Verify if the code meets the character limit and uses the correct language syntax.
Check if the code correctly extracts the zip code from the given string.
